data.name: Mysterious Monolith: Existence
data.col_2: Reach Assistant qualification.
data.col_5: Ability to harness more energy from the monolith (+100 energy)

data.name: Mysterious Monolith: Architecture
data.col_2: Reach Associate qualification.
data.col_5: Ability to harness more energy from the monolith (+150 energy)

data.name: Mysterious Monolith: Symbology
data.col_2: Reach Professor qualification.
data.col_5: Ability to harness more energy from the monolith (+100 energy)

data.name: Philosophy
data.col_2: Purchase the energised meteorite shard.
data.col_5: Ability to combine a crystal mattock and Imcando mattock with a meteorite shard to create the mattock of time and space

data.name: Writings of the Walls: Kharid-et
data.col_2: Study strange writing on the east side of the maximum security area of the prison block of Kharid-et Dig Site while wearing the master archaeologist's outfit.

data.name: Writings of the Walls: Infernal Source

wikiLinks.text: Writings of the Walls: Infernal Source

data.col_2: Study strange writing on the western wall in the first room of the Dungeon of Disorder in Infernal Source Dig Site while wearing the master archaeologist's outfit.

data.name: Writings of the Walls: Everlight
data.col_2: Study strange writing at the western end of an underground marble corridor, accessed by entering the door in the Acropolis of Everlight Dig Site while wearing the master archaeologist's outfit.

data.name: Writings of the Walls: Stormguard
data.col_2: Study strange writing on the eastern wall of the building in Research & Development north-west excavation site of Stormguard Citadel Dig Site while wearing the master archaeologist's outfit.

data.name: Writings of the Walls: Warforge
data.col_2: Study strange writing in the elevated north-western corner of Thalmund's Forge at Warforge Dig Site while wearing the master archaeologist's outfit.

data.name: Ikovian Tragedy
data.col_2: Study the Ikovian temple by clicking either the northern or southern archway in the Temple of Ikov excavation site.

data.name: Deer-ly Departed
data.col_2: Study the memorial megalith in the Keshik memorial excavation site.

data.name: The Aetherium Giant
data.col_2: Study the war golem arm in the middle of the south-western islands of Stormguard Citadel Dig Site. You'll need to be in flight, wearing the wingsuit v2 or higher to be able to reach this location.

data.name: Night and Day
data.col_2: Study the keshik coat of arms at the Nightguard tower. You'll need the wingsuit v2 or higher to be able to reach this location.

data.name: Howling Man
data.col_2: Study the theoretical blueprints in Howl's workshop. Players need a Stormguard gerege in the tool belt to access the area.

data.name: Back to the Drawing Board
data.col_2: Study and search the drafting bench inside Howl's workshop. Players need a Stormguard gerege in the tool belt to access this area.
data.col_5:
Prototype godsword (damaged)
Torn blueprint fragments (Howl's workshop)

data.name: Melting Point
data.col_2: Study the grille in the middle of the Crucible arena.

data.name: Too Many Bones
data.col_2: Study the animal skull in the animal pens of the Warforge Dig Site, south-west of the southern entrance to Thalmund's Forge.

data.name: Northside
data.col_2: Study the Big High War God shrine in the north goblin tunnels of the Warforge Dig Site.

data.name: Dwarven Forge
data.col_2: Study the hallmark on the western wall in the small room inside Thalmund's Forge.

data.name: Big High War Chest
data.col_2: Study the weapons cache in the area behind Bandos's sanctum, which is reachable after solving You Have Chosen... mystery.

data.name: Power Behind the Throne
data.col_2: Study Bandos's throne once you descend the lift at the Warforge Dig Site.

data.name: Let Sleeping Kin Lie
data.col_2: Study the hibernation pods in the Nodon Hibernatorium. The hibernatorium can be accessed during and after Desperate Measures.

data.name: Breath of Fire
data.col_2: Study the funeral pyre in the centre of the main area of the Crypt of Varanus.

data.name: Necropsy
data.col_2: Study the autopsy table inside the ruins of the observation outpost.

data.name: Mind Your Head
data.col_2: Study the Moksha device in the Moksha ritual site.

data.name: Xolo Dorado
data.col_2: Study the xolo temple pyramid in Xolo City.

data.name: Incomplete Portal Network I
data.col_2: Activate the Orthen teleportation device outside the Crypt of Varanus.

data.name: Incomplete Portal Network II
data.col_2: Activate the Orthen teleportation device outside the observation outpost after completing Incomplete Portal Network I.

data.name: Incomplete Portal Network III
data.col_2: Activate the Orthen teleportation device within the Moksha ritual site after completing Incomplete Portal Network II.

data.name: Imposing Stature
data.col_2: Study the statue of a dragonkin on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of Daemonheim.

data.name: Rest at the New Frontier
data.col_2: Study the remnants of a meeting space in the northernmost room of the ground floor[UK]1st floor[US] of Daemonheim.

data.name: On the Threshold of the Mind

wikiLinks.text: On the Threshold of the Mind

data.col_2: Study the imposing door in the northeastern room of the ground floor[UK]1st floor[US] of Daemonheim.

data.name: Making Sense of Sense
data.col_2: Study the research tables located in the north-eastern corner of the Daemonheim - Depths excavation site.

data.name: Thought Process
data.col_2: Study the mysterious engine in the Daemonheim - Depths excavation site.

data.name: Lions and Unicorns and Centaurs, Oh My!

wikiLinks.text: Lions and Unicorns and Centaurs, Oh My!

data.col_2: Study the mound of earth north-east of the scaffolding used to access the Everlight Dig Site.

data.name: Ode to a Midsummer Morning
data.col_2: Study the amphitheatre stage.

data.name: Stadio Ga Ga
data.col_2: Study the fallen stadium column at the Dominion Games stadium.

data.name: Home, Sweet Home
data.col_2: Study the partial statue of a woman just west of the statue of Hebe and east of the oikos studio debris.

data.name: Ground of the Polis
data.col_2: Study the stone tablet on the northern platform of the Acropolis.

data.name: Battle of Optimatoi
data.col_2: Study the icyene skeletons in the underwater cave.

data.name: Like Clockwork
data.col_2: Study the lighthouse mechanism in the underwater cave. Once inside, head into the room all the way at the northern end, then dive underwater.

data.name: Starry Eyed
data.col_2: Study the Star Lodge sign in the northwest corner of the Star Lodge cellar (first level).

data.name: The Dark Underbelly
data.col_2: Study the sacrificial altar in the Dungeon of Disorder.

data.name: Abandon All Hope
data.col_2: Study the portal chamber in Vestibule of Futility of the Source.

data.name: Deeper and Down
data.col_2: Study the hellhound marker on the southwest side near the byzroth remains in the Harrowing of the Source.

data.name: Who Dis?
data.col_2: Study the trapped demon by clicking the Dagon portal from Dagon Overlook to the hydra portal in the Source.

data.name: Hell Mouths
data.col_2: Study the hydra gate at the hydra portal, which is the gate where Dagon the Gatekeeper is standing in at the bottom of the Source.

data.name: Demon Door
data.col_2: Study the outer wall debris just south-east of the entrance inside the Kharid-et Dig Site, directly east of the imperial steel material cache.

data.name: Proving Grounds
data.col_2: Study the barracks rubble that form the doorway of the north-west building in the barracks at the Kharid-et Dig Site.

data.name: Cell, a Door
data.col_2: Study one of the cell doors in the prison block at the Kharid-et Dig Site.

data.name: Requiescat in Pace
data.col_2: Study the Orcus stained glass window in the chapel after passing the pontifex barrier at the Kharid-et Dig Site.

data.name: Where There's Smoke...
data.col_2: Study the oven in the Culinarum excavation site at the Kharid-et Dig Site.

data.name: Shadow Play
data.col_2: Study the war table inside the praetorium. The praetorium is accessible by entering the praetorium war table, either when the pylons are 100% charged or after powering all eight shadow anchors.

data.name: Lockdown
data.col_2: Study the central vault at the Kharid-et Dig Site, found during the first step of The Vault of Shadows mystery.

data.name: Nom-Nom-Nom-Nom
data.col_2: Partially complete Tomes of the Warlock quest

data.name: The Hidden Chamber
data.col_2: Study the cathedral bookcase found in the northwestern corner of the cathedral in Senntisten.

data.name: Prime Real Estate
data.col_2: Study the market stall outside of the colosseum gateway in Senntisten.

data.name: Complete the Pattern, Solve the Puzzle

wikiLinks.text: Complete the Pattern, Solve the Puzzle

data.col_2: Study the table in a small house at the far south end of the Nodon Front, south-west from the cathedral, and east of the house where Naressa is.

data.name: Are You Not Entertained?
data.col_2: Study the Gladiator Bones found in the middle of the Colosseum in Senntisten.

data.name: Crossing that Bridge
data.col_2: Study the scaffolding north of intern Jimmy, after obtaining the Inquisitior's Memoirs (page 5) during solving Secrets of the Inquisition mystery.

data.name: Asgarnia Smith
data.col_1: Near the rug merchant in the Bedabin Camp
data.col_7: Increases the amount of materials found

data.name: Elissa Giovanni
data.col_7: Increases the chance of discovering artefacts

data.name: Dr Nabanik
data.col_5: Third Age Expert: Guarantees the discovery of an artefact (2+ hours only)

data.name: Movario
data.col_5: Extra Resourceful: Greatly increases the amount of materials found

data.name: Zanik
data.col_5: Zealous: Happily works free of charge

data.name: Mr Mordaut
data.col_5: Treasure Hoarder: Gives a chance to obtain a tetracompass piece (research time/24).
